_place_title: Clean Slate Ink - Tattoo Removal in Round Rock, TX

review_text: I originally had a pink tattoo and after three sessions, it was about 95% gone. I came back in to get the last few areas, and the whole tattoo turned a green/blue. After another session, it got darker. I came back for another session and they assured me it would be gone after that. It has gotten darker with every session, and I just talked to another tattoo removal shop that told me it will be impossible to get out, because the white ink from the pink has oxidized and more sessions will continue to make it darker. They told me that whoever originally removed the tattoo should have known that and warned me about it. I'm incredibly disappointed that Clean Slate Ink did not responsibly remove my tattoo and inform me of what was going on, and continued to take my money while making the issue worse. I now have a green/blue faded tattoo on my wrist that looks worse than my original tattoo and can only be covered by an even larger tattoo. I'm honestly devastated. I would recommend going somewhere else that has more knowledge and experience and will be more up front with you.
_place_title: Clean Slate Ink - Tattoo Removal in Round Rock, TX

review_text:
Posting this in hopes of saving someone a few dollars and to help manage expectations.

I started coming to cleanslate last September and in my consult was told that my tattoos should be gone within 6-8 sessions, and for sure ahead of my wedding in December of this year.

I have had 10 sessions now with little to no change at $250 a session. Once we hit the 8 session mark, I asked if they would be gone by my wedding. I was told, no, but they have really good makeup to cover them up.

I would not have put myself through the pain or investment if I wanted to find “good makeup”

I understand each person is unique but I feel the expectations and progress were severely mismanaged.

After receiving another opinion and being told that tattoo removal is always a 2 year process, I have decided to stop going to cleanslate.

I know a lot of their positive reviews are from 2-5 years ago so not sure if something has changed with equipment but thought this experience would be helpful to anyone considering this process.
_place_title: Clean Slate Ink - Tattoo Removal in Round Rock, TX

review_text: I had awful awful years old eyebrow tattoos on my face that had turned reddish brown and were so uneven it was embarrassing. I thought because of the color that I would never be able to have them removed. Thankfully, I found clean slate ink and he said he could remove them!! For me it only took about two sessions but it always depends on each person. Price was very reasonable for removing something permanent off my face and super friendly service. It actually worked!! The ugly old tattoos are long gone. It made such a massive difference for me and I am so incredibly grateful and glad I got it done. Sooooo worth it! HIGHLY recommend!!

review_text: If you’re considering tattoo removal, this is the place to go. I have some tattoos on my hands that didn’t take well and unfortunately started to break apart. There was zero judgement, and they explained the process and aftercare to me and made sure I was comfortable. Quick service and the place is extremely clean and inviting. I had a lot of fun despite the painful process, but they are very focused on keeping you comfortable and communicating to you what to expect each step of the way. I truly appreciated how knowledgeable they both are on the ins and outs of tattoos and tattoo removal. They’re both very kind and personable, yet professional which helped calm my nerves. Very fast booking, fast paper work check in time, and I had no wait time to be seen either. Can’t say enough good things or recommended clean slate enough. I’ll definitely be returning until my tattoos are gone!
